title: Cutting the Home Page Load Path: Lazy GIFs, Lazy Routes, and Phaser Preload Timing
summary: I removed eager Phaser preloading, deferred showcase GIF downloads, and split route bundles to reduce CodeGrind's initial home page load pressure.

social.bluesky_text: Cutting the home page load path: lazy GIFs, lazy routes, and Phaser preload timing. I moved Phaser preload behind user intent, deferred showcase media, and split route bundles for a cleaner first load. Details:...
